mapper.update: update post set view_count=#{viewCount} where id=#{id}
update post set like_count = like_count + 1 where id = #{id}
update post set like_count = like_count - 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select id from post where user_id=#{uid}
and type =#{type}
select type from post where id=#{postId}
mapper.delete:
delete from post where user_id in
#{item,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
